title: Vowel Spellchecker
hints: Consider preprocessing the wordlist into lookup structures to avoid scanning it for every query, leveraging the small word length constraint.
Use three separate hash maps: one for exact matches, one for case-insensitive keys, and one for keys with vowels replaced by a placeholder.
For the vowel map, store the first occurrence of each canonical form (lowercased with vowels removed or masked) to handle precedence correctly.
